title: P0.4: Run Query button executes query refresh
verifies: rowCount > 0 after Run Query refresh (was vacuous >=0)

title: P1.1: Multiple segment filters compose (AND logic)
verifies: composed AND filter row count is ≤ initial unfiltered count

title: P1.6: DateTime range change triggers auto-refresh
verifies: initial count > 0 and wider range count ≥ initial count after Past 1 Hour

title: P2.1: Bounced session shows bounced label and no sparkline
verifies: bounced label visible AND activity sparkline NOT visible for bounced sessions

title: P2.3: Health cell shows correct badge (error, frustration, clean)
verifies: at least one health tag type was found (unconditional fallback assertion)

title: P2.4: Insight banner — apply button sets health segment
verifies: insight banner apply sets health segment; skips via test.skip() when banner absent

title: P2.5: Insight banner — filter button adds error_message to query
verifies: error_message query param present in URL after insight filter click; skips via test.skip() when absent
